primary_text:
If your pet sees the vet twice a year, you are already paying more than Best for Pet costs.

Two standard consults: $260 to $300. Add vaccinations ($95), a dental check ($350+), and parasite prevention ($120+). You are looking at $800 to $1,300 a year in routine care.

Best for Pet: $50 a month. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. Plus 24/7 virtual vet access.

Not insurance. No claims. No excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Two vet visits a year? You are paying too much.
description: $50/month covers unlimited consults, all vaccinations, $250 off dental. Not insurance.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Calculator visual. Left: itemised vet costs stacking up. Right: single line $50/month with checkmarks.
